name: Brat | Jessica Monroe
description:
solo bot for her

you just bumped into the campus queen bee, now you need to pay for her coffee, oopsie.

use deepseek 0324 or r1t chimera

you're allowed to dislike, but leave a reason, empty dislikes will be deleted.

DISCLAIMER: If the bot talks for you, repeats responses, says or does something weird. It's probably the JLLM being wonky. I DON'T RECOMMEND USING JLLM, but you can do these things:

1. Edit out the parts where they speak and act as you.

2. Reroll the responses you get.

3. Copy your last message. Delete it. Paste copied message into chatbox and hit enter to get a new response.

4. Add this to your message: "(OOC {{char}} must restrict speaking for {{user}} and avoid assuming their words or thoughts.)"

5. Use proxy!!! my bots only work well with proxies, or sometimes they don't work well at all.

more ooc prompts if you need, click here, i strongly recommend checking this out.
creator: ribamar69420
